intention: 帮助公司卖出产品或推动销售
sentencePatterns: Good ... can help the company sell ...
realLifeExamples: Good advertising can help the company sell its products.
Better packaging helps the company sell more units online.
usageNotes: 这里常用 help + object + base verb，语气更紧凑自然。
productionPrompts: 用 Good ... can help the company sell ... 造一句和产品或品牌有关的句子。
